seoTitle: Verify PayPal Without a Bank Account or Card (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to verify your PayPal identity using government ID and a biometric scan instead of linking a bank account or credit card.
intro: You can still reach fully verified status on PayPal without linking a traditional bank account or credit card. This guide covers the alternative identity verification route using government-issued ID and a biometric check. It's aimed at users who want higher limits and trust status without connecting financial instruments.

steps.heading: Open the identity verification prompt
steps.body: Check your notifications or go to the Resolution Center to find the Confirm Your Identity option.

steps.heading: Choose alternative verification
steps.body: Look for a route that bypasses the standard Link a Bank or Card prompts.

steps.heading: Enter your legal name and tax ID
steps.body: Select your country and input your official legal name along with your national tax identification number.

steps.heading: Choose and upload your document
steps.body: Pick your available ID type, such as national ID, passport, or driver's license, and upload a clear full-page color scan.

steps.heading: Complete a biometric scan and submit
steps.body: Use your device camera to complete a real-time facial match scan, then submit for review and monitor your status for the verified badge.

faq.question: Can I fully use PayPal without ever linking a bank?
faq.answer: Yes, alternative identity verification lets you reach verified status, though some withdrawal options may still require a card or bank eventually.

faq.question: Which documents are accepted for this route?
faq.answer: Common options include a national ID, passport, or driver's license, depending on your country.

faq.question: Why is a biometric scan required?
faq.answer: The facial match scan adds a modern multi-factor layer to confirm the ID belongs to the person submitting it.

faq.question: How long does this alternative verification take?
faq.answer: Turnaround times vary, but most reviews complete within a few business days after submission.
